info.title: IDEAapi v2
info.description: This is the OpenAPI schema for API version 2

product_uom_id.title: Product Uom Id
product_uom_id.description: Unit of Measure is the unit of measurement for the inventory control

sequence.title: Sequence
sequence.description: Sequence. Gives the sequence order when displaying a list of bills of material.

ready_to_produce.description: Manufacturing Readiness. Defines when a Manufacturing Order is considered as ready to be started.

consumption.description: Defines if you can consume more or less components than the quantity defined on the BoM.

hs_code.title: Hs Code
hs_code.description: Product HS code for international shipping and goods declaration

is_bundle.title: Is Bundle
is_bundle.description: Product is a bundle of products

images.title: Images
images.description: Given values must be in format "url:http://idea-commerce.com/1.jpg" or "data:5HNfHd4KQ2[...]"

allow_negative_stock.title: Allow Negative Stock
allow_negative_stock.description: Allow negative stock levels for the stockable products attached to this location

include_all_sublocations.title: Include All Sublocations
include_all_sublocations.description: Include all sublocations in this location

posx.title: Posx
posx.description: Optional localization details, for information purpose only

posy.title: Posy
posy.description: Optional localization details, for information purpose only

posz.title: Posz
posz.description: Optional localization details, for information purpose only

return_location.title: Return Location
return_location.description: Is used as a return location

scrap_location.title: Scrap Location
scrap_location.description: Is used as a scrap location

company_id.description: Let this field empty if this location is shared between companies

location_id.description: The parent location that includes this location

move_type.description: Shipping Policy. It specifies goods to be deliver partially or all at once

priority.description: Products will be reserved first for the transfers with the highest priorities

scheduled_date.title: Scheduled Date
scheduled_date.description: Scheduled time for the first part of the shipment to be processed. Setting manually a value here would set it as expected date for all the stock moves

location_id.description: Source location. If not set defaults to picking_type.default_location_src_id

location_dest_id.description: Destination location. If not set defaults to picking_type.default_location_dest_id

owner_id.description: When validating the transfer, the products will be assigned to this owner

product_uom_id.title: Product Uom Id
product_uom_id.description: Unit of Measure is the unit of measurement for the inventory control

sequence.title: Sequence
sequence.description: Sequence. Gives the sequence order when displaying a list of bills of material.

sync_error.title: Sync Error
sync_error.example: Error: could not connect to marketplace API

propagate_cancel.title: Propagate Cancel
propagate_cancel.description: Propagate cancel and split. If checked, when this move is cancelled, cancel the linked move too

propagate_date.title: Propagate Date
propagate_date.description: Propagate Rescheduling. The rescheduling is propagated to the next move

propagate_date_minimum_delta.title: Propagate Date Minimum Delta
propagate_date_minimum_delta.description: Reschedule if Higher Than. The change must be higher than this value to be propagated

id.title: Id
id.description: ID of the record. May be None if self.name is not None

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the record. May be None if self.id is not None

default_code.title: Default Code
default_code.description: SKU of the record. May be None if self.id is not None

barcode.title: Barcode
barcode.description: EAN of the record. May be None if self.id is not None
